title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Becomes a Swordsman Once More
overview: After being wrongly fired from his party, an enchanter begins a new life.

title: No Going Back for the Jack-of-All-Trades
overview: Orhun begins his descent into the dungeon with the new recruits.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Voices His Ideal
overview: The students find an article that says Orhun was fired for being too weak.

title: The Heroes Party Looks Back
overview: With Orhun gone, the Heroes Party is forced to confront its weakness.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades' Bad Feeling Comes True
overview: The training expedition comes to an end as unexpected disaster looms.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Overcomes His Limits
overview: Orhun faces the Black Dragon alone.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Follows His Feelings
overview: Orhun must decide what he'll do with his life now that he's alone.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Fights With Everyone
overview: Orhun settles into his new role at the Night Sky Silver Rabbits.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades has a Bad Feeling
overview: Orhun goes on his first dungeon dive with his new party.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Makes Them Train Hard
overview: Orhun starts to train the new recruits.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Fears For His Friends
overview: Orhun and Unit 1 begin their attack on the Black Dragon.

title: The Jack-of-All-Trades Protects His Comrades
overview: With his students in danger, Orhun is forced to act fast in his battle with the Black Dragon.
